summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No PR has complete merge preflight proof because Codex /review evidence is absent and mergeability is unknown in the hydrated artifact. No concrete repair artifact is safe from the compacted data, so each PR is classified independently for normal maintainer review rather than merge or replacement.

actions.reason: Independent docs PR with passing documented checks, but not merge-recommendable without complete merge preflight.
Independent feature PR with compatibility-risk label; no duplicate/canonical relationship and no complete merge preflight.
Independent narrow bug-fix PR with passing checks, but session-state risk and missing merge preflight keep it in maintainer-review path.
Independent scoped contributor PR; useful code should remain open for maintainer review rather than be superseded or replaced without review findings.
Independent SMS runtime fix with passing checks, but no complete merge preflight in the artifact.
